testcase.name: verifyBlankLastNameShowsValidationError

failure.message: Expected a validation error on Last Name after submitting blank value expected [true] but found [false]

testcase.name: verifyUpdatedNamePersistsAfterSave

failure.message: First name did not persist after save. Expected: 'Alaa' expected [Alaa] but found []

testcase.name: verifyProfilePageDisplaysCurrentDetails

failure.message: The following asserts failed: First name field is empty — expected a pre-populated value expected [false] but found [true], Email field is empty — expected the customer email to be shown expected [false] but found [true], Email field value '' does not contain '@' expected [true] but found [false]
